app.title: Adventure
app.hero.subtitle: An accessible D&D 5e tabletop in your browser. Play with friends, go solo, or just spectate. Every seat at the table is yours to fill however you want.
auth.signInPrompt: Choose how to sign in to Adventure.
auth.signInToCreate: Sign in to create a campaign
auth.signInToCreateChar: Sign in to create a character
auth.signInToImport: Sign in to import a character
auth.signInToManage: Sign in to create and manage campaigns.
auth.signInToManageChars: Sign in to create and manage characters.
auth.signInToRestore: Sign in to restore a backup
feature.neverPlayed.label: Never Played? Perfect.
feature.neverPlayed.desc: The game teaches you as you go. Build a character, roll dice, fight monsters. No rulebook required.
feature.realDice.label: Real Dice, Real Drama
feature.realDice.desc: Crits glow gold. Fumbles shake the screen. Every roll matters and it feels like it.
feature.bringEveryone.label: Bring Everyone
feature.bringEveryone.desc: Solo, duo, full table. Human, AI, or no AI at all. Works on any device with a browser.
feature.combat.label: Fight Stuff Together
feature.combat.desc: Cast fireballs, flank enemies, save your friends from dying. Combat that actually feels like combat.
feature.maps.label: Explore Real Maps
feature.maps.desc: Uncover fog of war, dodge traps, find treasure. Move your token and see what happens.
feature.quickStart.label: Play in 60 Seconds
feature.quickStart.desc: No downloads. No accounts. No 400-page rulebook. Click a campaign and you are in.
howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1.desc: Start a campaign in one click, or paste a room code to join your friends. No accounts required — play as a guest instantly.
howItWorks.step2.desc: Create characters with full D&D 5e stats, or import from D&D Beyond. Assign seats to humans or AI — any mix works.
howItWorks.step3.desc: Explore, fight, and roleplay with live dice, fog of war, AI narration, and real-time sync. Everything runs in your browser.
quickStart.title: Quick Start Adventures
char.rollStats: Roll your stats first before exporting.
char.needName: Give your character a name first.
dice.secretMode: Secret Mode On — rolls are DM-only
